underlying_goal: Build and iterate on a TDD signal optimization framework for a trading strategy, optimizing scoring weights, entry gates, and normalization to improve oracle candle alignment
friction_detail: Claude violated documented rules by setting timeouts and running parallel backtests, and had multiple OOM kills requiring iterative memory optimization fixes.
brief_summary: User wanted a signal optimization framework for their trading strategy with oracle alignment analysis; Claude built 5 modules with 43 tests and iteratively fixed OOM issues, but violated existing project rules causing frustration.
